CS&BS

# Computer Science & Business Systems

Established 2020

[Faculty](/departments/cs-bs/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To create technology leaders who understand both computer science and business dynamics.

### Mission

* Integrate computer science with business management principles
* Develop professionals with technical and business acumen
* Foster entrepreneurial thinking and innovation
* Build industry connections for practical business exposure

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Computer Science & Business Systems

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 60

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* Programming Lab
* Database Management Lab
* Business Analytics Lab
* ERP Lab
* Project Lab
* Software Engineering Lab
